---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for whatsimule
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem or limitation is (e.g. "I wish I could...").

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen and how it should work.

## 🎨 Alternative Solutions
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📌 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design ideas about the feature request here.
